notes: Thresholds are conservative floors derived from the recorded run on an Apple Silicon laptop.
Re-record by running `zig build bench -Doptimize=ReleaseFast` and committing the produced bench/results.json values.
echo.rps_single_core is the in-process handler hot-path rps (no TCP loopback). A true cross-process loopback bench will land alongside W1.1 server-upgrades; bump the threshold then.
alloc_delta_per_request is enforced via TigerBeetle's StaticAllocator tripwire — any heap alloc during the hot loop panics.
